name: MinIO Storage
description: MinIO (S3-compatible) storage backend, contributed into storage:provider — sandboxed. Path-style SigV4 PutObject/DeleteObject via host crypto; the secret key stays host-side.

settings.label: Endpoint URL
settings.help: MinIO base URL, e.g. https://minio.example.com (used for egress + the allowlist).

secrets.label: Secret Key
secrets.help: MinIO secret key; used host-side in the SigV4 chain, never seen by the plugin.
